overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a mountainous forest trail during morning hours. The character encounters two horse riders passing by and continues toward a campfire site in the rocky wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with rocky outcrops and pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the mountain trail with sun creating a silhouette effect from behind

entered.detail: large rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the trail
distant mountain peak visible through the trees against the bright sky
tall pine tree standing prominently in the center of the path ahead
large gray boulder sitting among grass on the right side of the trail
narrow dirt path with tall grass and wildflowers on either side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a mountain trail in the early morning, with the sun low behind creating a backlit silhouette. Rocky slopes line the left side while scattered pine trees and boulders dot the landscape ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail intersection with horse riders

events.description: two riders on horses emerge from the right and gallop past the character heading left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as two mounted riders pass by closely on the right

notable_agents.action: rider on brown horse galloping past from right to left
second rider on horse following the first at speed

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses along the trail, two horse riders suddenly appear from the right and gallop past, kicking up dust. The rocky terrain continues with distant mountain peaks visible through the morning haze.

events.description: campfire with visible flames comes into view on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking through increasingly rocky terrain toward a campsite with a burning fire

entered.detail: burning campfire with orange flames and smoke rising, situated next to the trail
large rocky overhang and boulders forming a sheltered area on the left
expansive view of distant mountain ranges visible through the clearing

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through rocky terrain with scattered boulders and sparse trees. As the character approaches a campsite, a burning campfire becomes visible on the left, nestled against a rocky overhang with expansive mountain views opening up ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rugged mountain trail that transitions from a backlit morning trek into the discovery of a wilderness campsite. It begins with the character walking through a silhouette of pine trees and boulders, with the low morning sun casting a strong backlight across the rocky slopes. As the character progresses, the stillness is interrupted by two horse riders galloping past from the right and kicking up dust against a backdrop of hazy distant peaks. The scene then continues through the sparse, rocky terrain before the trail opens up to reveal a burning campfire nestled against a rocky overhang. Finally, the camera pushes forward toward the campsite as expansive views of the surrounding mountains unfold ahead.
